backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a chat backend with user profiles, conversations, and messages, using role-based access control to restrict operations to authenticated (non-anonymous) users.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the ChatFlow app, loading the React app via main.tsx and including Google Fonts preconnect links.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing the authentication and onboarding flow, rendering LoadingScreen, LoginPage, ProfileSetupModal, or MessagingLayout based on auth and profile state.
frontend/src/components/ChatHeader.tsx: Sticky chat header component displaying the recipient's avatar, name, online status, and placeholder action buttons for search, call, and options.
frontend/src/components/ChatView.tsx: Main chat area component rendering grouped message bubbles with date separators, auto-scroll, and an empty state prompt when no conversation is selected.
frontend/src/components/ContactsList.tsx: Dark sidebar component listing all registered users (excluding the current user) with avatars, online indicators, search filtering, and active conversation highlighting.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the ChatFlow login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying app features and a login/logout button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Text input component for composing and sending messages in a conversation, supporting Enter-to-send and showing a spinner while the send mutation is pending.
Top-level layout component that combines the contacts sidebar and chat view, managing the active conversation state and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to set a username and status message, submitting via the registerUser mutation on first login.
Small presentational component that renders a colored dot indicating online or offline status.
frontend/src/components/UserAvatar.tsx: Displays a user avatar as a colored circle with initials, deriving a consistent color from the username hash.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for user profile operations (get, save, register, list), online status checks, and conversation/message interactions with the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter font, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes including WhatsApp-inspired chat-specific color tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Inter font, oklch-based CSS variable color mappings for UI and chat-specific tokens, custom border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 7) describing a WhatsApp-like messaging app, listing existing features, architectural notes, and image requirements for build planning.
